Master of Otto van Moerdrecht

1 work in the gallery.
Click any image to enlarge. Use ← → or close with Esc.
Leaf from a Missal: The Crucifixion (Frontispiece for the Canon of the Mass)
by Master of Otto van Moerdrecht
North Netherlands, Augustinian Cloister of Agnietenberg, near Zwolle, 15th century · c. 1440–1450 · ink, tempera, and gold on vellum
←Moderno Salado branch of the Mogollon→
